tech_news.title: Splatoon Raiders Direct 6.30.2026 - Nintendo
tech_news.description: Join us on June 30 at 7am PT for the Splatoon Raiders Direct! The presentation will last roughly 15 minutes and provide more info on the upcoming Nintendo Switch 2 game.
